description_long: This is a modern, armless couch with a minimalist design, upholstered in a solid blue fabric. The seat and backrest are divided into two large, rectangular cushions, both of which appear thick and well-padded for comfort. The backrest and seat cushions are seamlessly integrated into the frame, with no visible separation or loose pillows. The couch sits on four short, exposed metal legs that are slightly angled outward, providing stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The upholstery is smooth and unadorned, with no visible tufting, stitching, or decorative patterns. The overall silhouette is boxy and geometric, making it suitable for urban environments such as parks, lobbies, or public waiting areas.
description: A modern, armless blue couch with thick, integrated seat and back cushions, supported by short, angled metal legs. The design is minimalist and boxy, with smooth, solid upholstery.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the seat and back cushions, and the exposed metal legs.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the divided seat and back cushions, and the full width of the couch.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the thickness and structure of the cushions and legs.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the continuous, unbroken backrest and the back profile of the legs.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, rectangular seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all integrated and attached to the frame with no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue fabric with a smooth, untextured surface and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_leg_style: Short, exposed metal legs with a slight outward angle, rectangular in cross-section, and a modern, minimalist design.
attribute_armrest_design: No armrests present; the sides are open and flush with the seat and back cushions.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, continuous backrest divided into two sections, cushioned and attached, with a smooth, unadorned surface.
